title: HybridRAG V2 frozen aggregation seed set

gate_policy.notes: Use this frozen manifest as the promotion gate for the narrow aggregation lane.

items.question: How many files are in `research_benchmarks/confabulations/questions`?
items.scope_rule: Count files directly under the questions folder only; do not recurse.
items.counting_note: Direct filesystem count from the frozen on-disk slice.
items.evidence_notes: README benchmark summary is not the answer source for this item.

items.question: How many total response files are under `responses_possible_v2_post`?
items.scope_rule: Recurse through all provider folders under responses_possible_v2_post.
items.evidence_notes: The tree is stable at 39 providers with 16 files each.

items.question: How many distinct response basenames are represented under `responses_possible_v2_post`?
items.scope_rule: Dedup by basename only, not by folder path.
items.dedup_rule: Treat each `question_merged_*.txt` basename as the identity.
items.evidence_notes: This is the clean answer-key inventory count.

items.question: How many lines are in `research_benchmarks/confabulations/articles/list.txt`?
items.scope_rule: Count all lines in the file as written.

items.question: How many provider entities were tallied across the three cross-slice runs?
items.scope_rule: Use the provider_entities total from the summary JSON.
items.dedup_rule: Rely on the manifest aggregate; do not re-sum the per-run files unless reconciling the manifest.
items.evidence_notes: This is the clean cross-corpus aggregation question from the rollup.

items.question: How many rows are in `query_pack_400_manifest_v11`?
items.evidence_notes: This is the denominator for the split counts.

items.question: How many rows have both `question_context_entities` and `answer_entities`?
items.dedup_rule: Each row counts once even if it carries multiple entities.
items.evidence_notes: This is the cleanest shared-entity partition.

items.question: How many rows have `question_context_only` entities?
items.evidence_notes: This partition was previously sensitive to label echo.

items.question: How many rows have `answer_entities_only`?
items.evidence_notes: Clean answer-bearing rows with no question-context echo.

items.question: How many rows are in the `2026-04-14` three-way adjudication set?
items.scope_rule: Count rows in the dated adjudication folder only.

items.question: How many rows in that three-way set have `relationship_agreement = none`?
items.scope_rule: Count the `none` rows only in the dated adjudication slice.
items.counting_note: Failure-counting question in the adjudication slice.
items.evidence_notes: This is the cleanest disagreement-count benchmark.
